mapper.select: select month(cs.schedule_date) as month, count(*) as value from appointment a left join counselor_schedule cs on a.schedule_id = cs.id where year(cs.schedule_date) = #{year} group by month(cs.schedule_date) order by month asc

select concat(score, '分') as name, count(*) as value from feedback
and create_time >= #{beginDate}
and create_time < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)
group by score order by score asc
